body: Thanks for getting in touch — Joan here, I look after the diary for Owen Hampton Electrical. I can pencil you in this week, would Thursday morning suit for Owen to call and quote?
Owen had a look today. He'll send the written quote by tomorrow evening; materials are in stock so we could schedule the work for next week.
Just confirming Owen's visit for Thursday between 9 and 10. He'll ring 15 minutes before he arrives.
Following up — did the quote come through okay? Happy to answer any questions before you decide.
That's booked in. Owen will bring the parts with him so it's a single visit. Total as per the quote, payment on completion.
Sorry to hear that — if it's a full loss of power to one area Owen treats it as priority. He can be with you within the hour, is someone home?
All sorted on our end — completion cert will be emailed to you within a couple of days for your records.
No bother, glad it's working now. The 12-month workmanship guarantee covers that install, so call us if anything else comes up.
